traces.review_text: yummy
Lots of awesome tea!

Found a yummy tea to match my tumbler!  Lol. Seriously this is my favorite fruit/berry tea. First time I’ve tried it. I purchased it as an add on item.  What a truly pleasant surprise.  I questioned whether I would really get 15-30 servings out of it given the size of the bag, but I’m pleased to say that I measured it out with my teaspoon to be 15 servings so by brewing it twice I will get 30 servings.  I brewed mine the full 5 minutes. Obviously as would be expected the second brew is weaker, but I just mix the 2 brews together in the tumbler shown in the pic. I brew 8 ounces of water. I even tried to make a 3rd brew using 6 ounces of water, but the result was dismal.  I suppose you could still add it to the first two brews if you like s weaker version, but my granddaughter and I decided not to. Sophia age 8 is living this tea as much as I am.  She’s new to loose leaf tea and I’ve now created a little tea monster that my daughter Samantha will have to deal with when I leave. Poor Sam!  Seriously folks of you like fruity, aromatic tea then this tea is for you!  While I was measuring the tea out by teaspoon Sophia actually asked me if she could use the tea bits as potpourri in her room!  It smells divine.  I started to tell her that it would be very expensive potpourri, but let’s face it folks there is even more expensive potpourri than what this costs me so yes- you can use it to make your house smell heavenly too!  Drink up you tea lovers drink up!  I’m raising my purple tumbler to you in a friendly tea toast and please reply to me with the names of your favorite teas and tea makers so that my g baby Fi and I can try them too as well as your favorite kettles, cups, and loose leaf tea holders.  FYI:  I read a review on here yesterday stating that ALL teabags are held together using polymers that scientists are now trying to determine if those polymers cause cance etc. something along those lines anyways.  The reviewer stated that yhst was why they had turned to lease leaf only. As a person who lost both of my parents to pancreatic cancer 22 years apart and has been tested and now knows that I carry an inherited dna gene I urge everyone to begin limiting your exposure and therefore your risk to all things known or suspected to cause cancer. Happy drinking everybody!
traces.review_title: OMG- purple tea! Color me happy!  Yum yum yummy!!

traces.review_text: I was at a bnb recently that had Ahmad teas (bagged) that I thoroughly enjoyed so when I was looking for a loose leaf jasmine this popped up and I decided to give it a try. It’s delightful. I love the smell and the taste. I am disabled and I live on a small fixed income so I’m glad that this is affordable too. I brewed 1 tsp for 5 minutes and I brewed it that way 2 more times so I managed to get 3 servings out of the 1tsp.  I’m very pleased with this purchase and I will definitely be trying more of their loose leaf teas.

I love these Clif bars. All that yummy goodness with the chocolate in every bite is just my favorite snack morning, noon, and night. I keep them in my purse at all times. Yes I said them as in 2-3. I’m disabled so I ride the bus or parstransit and it never fails that someone else wants to try it and half a bar leaves me hungry so I always carry spares now. You should too!

Luckily I purchased this on a lightning deal for $14.99 I think. I’m disabled and I live in a fixed income so I’m very thrifty with my money.  I really enjoy this tea and I have found that I can re-brew the tea leaves 2-3 times with no loss of flavor. As a matter of fact I prefer the second brew better every time. It’s always smoother. I read somewhere in a review that you should always brew uuur tea for 30-60 seconds and throw that tea out and then brew it the desired amount of time.  Yes, it removes about 90% of the caffeine, but it leaves such a very smooth tasting tea behind.  Sometimes I just mix all 3 brews together in one big Lifefactory glass jar and drink it that way throughout the day. Others I just drink them one after the other. It’s yummy tea.
The tea is very good and I love the container. I can’t wait to buy more of them.
traces.review_title: Yummy tea with a cool tin

traces.review_text: I was never a huge fan of Earl Grey tea until I found this one. It’s exquisite.
This is my #1 favorite tea by my #1 favorite tea maker. It is just delicious and the smell is heavenly.
This is an excellent white tea and the jasmine is wonderful.
Yummy for your tummy.
Great for making brownies and crinkle cookies.
My favorite!

These are very tasty. They are extremely soft and literally melt on your tongue. The sea salt is delicious.  The packaging is nice too. Yummy, but too pricey for my budget on a regular basis.  There were 21 caramels in my container.  They are about twice the size of the Werther’s Chewy caramels that I usually purchase.  They taste excellent. I wish they had some with pecans and/or walnuts or pistachios in them. I ordered the sea salt version. Yum!
Excellent!  The best!  I use it with my beef and broccoli and to throw in chicken and rice soup. It’s also great by itself. Yum!
Excellent!! Yummy!  Great with other foods and great alone.

This hot cereal is pretty delicious - the consistency is very similar to regular oatmeal. I added sliced banana and blueberries to it. However, I am giving this product 4 stars because it is quite expensive, and even using a measuring cup was unable to produce the number of servings stated on the bag. I was able to create my own paleo hot cereal with very similar results for half the cost. For my purposes, this product was great for taking along on a road trip for a quick breakfast.
traces.review_title: This hot cereal is pretty delicious - the consistency is very similar to regular ...

traces.review_text: DO NOT buy this coconut water if you have SOY ALLERGY or want the real thing. The 'NATURAL FLAVOURS' in it is LIKELY soy-derived. Stick with other brands that get their water from Thailand or Phillipines and make sure ingredients are 100% coconut water.

I have tried four other reishi products on the market to figure out the differences on my own. Here is what I found.

Red reishi is very different from other kinds of reishi. The extraction process and mg content always differs according to manufacturer. Out of the four I have tried, the ground organic reishi was the one that I could feel a noticeable difference. However, there are two studies that suggest daily dosages of GROUND reishi for more than a month can cause liver failure. Other studies show that red reishi majorly benefits liver issues. So I chose this tea thinking, hey, its a tea bag, right? So maybe this product is exempt.

Wrong. It comes beautifully packaged in these tiny powdered tea packets, so what I got was basically a quarter of the amount of reishi I actually got when I ordered the organic ground version from another company. Plus, it is still GROUND, posing a possible health risk if used in larger amounts (which I feel I need for the allergies I'm using it for). So if you're looking mainly for the health benefits, you are basically paying for the other added ingredients in the packet to make the bitter reishi powder palatable, such as licorice and stevia. The taste is good, but if I wanted good taste, I'd head to the grocery store. 1000 mg of reishi in these tiny packs is just not going to cut it.

I will be going back to my organic ground reishi, albeit with a tea strainer of some kind. If you're going for taste, this tea is nice. Other than that, you are just buying the pretty packaging in my honest opinion.

I bought this product religiously years ago. Now, with the new labeling, they've also sweetened the product and I had an allergic reaction to it. I have a severe anaphylactic soy allergy, so I realized I may have reacted to the 'natural flavors' now used in this product. Never buying this again. Instead, I'm buying their powdered wheatgrass, which only contains the ONE ingredient. Simple, effective and GMO-free.
traces.review_title: Now Tastes Sweet With Natural Flavors...AKA GMOs?

traces.review_text: A natural ayurvedic remedy for allergies is between 3000-5000mg vitamin C. I take 2-3 of these packets a day with my water and it helps tremendously with allergies. It also helps my iron absorption but do not take with medications since there are small amounts of other vitamins that can interact with meds. Be sure to check with your doctor, first.

I highly recommend this for those with allergies. It bakes and makes pancakes very nicely. You just have to know what to add in to make it tasty. My default add-ins for any recipe tend to be vanilla extract, about 1/4 to 1/2 tsp sea salt (depending on recipe), baking soda, baking powder and Nutritious Yeast (adds buttery flavor to anything and a good oil like organic non-GMO canola or organic coconut oil (especially delicious for pancakes, donuts or any fried sweets). I usually mix this flour as half of what the recipe calls for with half of another alternative like tapioca (aka cassava), arrowroot flour or coconut flour.
traces.review_title: My nearby grocery had this...LOVE IT

traces.review_text: This is absolutely hands-down my favorite water for when I go walking outdoors. However, make sure to alternate it with juices or other drinks...even regular filtered water. Do not drink while taking iron supplements or if you are anemic. The calcium chloride could block iron absorption. As with everything, moderation is key.
traces.review_title: EXCELLENT WATER, HOWEVER...MAY BLOCK IRON ABSORPTION

traces.review_text: I LOVE this stuff. It smells a lot like Filipino durian but once cooked in a recipe it tastes completely different from the smell. You do have to make a few recipes with it to learn the lesson that a pinch is really enough, because its very easy to add another pinch, but unfortunately that can ruin a recipe. One pinch is enough for about 4 cups worth of food. I use it for everything cooked and it gives a nice flavor when mixed with other spices. Keeps sensitive stomachs happy!!!
YUM! Perfect color and taste! 1lb is very small. I was surprised to see the final size of the bag and amount that I got. A little expensive for the quantity. But delicious.
Amazing! I love this! THM (Trim Healthy Mama) recommended and they tasted just like regular pasta! Best ever!

I really love this for cooking and baking! It does not have the coconut smell and taste as you might want... but I do not like my eggs tasting like coconut. I love this! =) great coconut oil without the coconut smell. =)
widely considered the best green tea for the money
so good.  mix with soy sauce and seseme oil for a great sauce
traces.review_title: so good. mix with soy sauce and seseme oil for ...

traces.review_text:
LOVED these! Great Gift Idea!
The package was smaller than I expected, but the caramels were yummy! Great addition to my kids stocking this year!
Not bad...not great. It takes getting used to.

The best tasting Nutritional Yeast on the planet.
I wish it would come in larger bags.
fantastic
Love it but it could be a little more robust. Definitely low on acidity as stated.
VERY sweet and acidic. I was hoping for a thicker consistency because it it quite watery.
I LOVE this product. It smells good, tastes good, and adds real creaminess. A great alternative to dairy creamers. It also adds some creaminess to my fruit smoothies. I highly recommend.
Just get it. If you love PB but your looking to cut back on fat and calories then this is it.
The smell, taste and viscosity of this oil was very nice. It makes a great salad oil with lemon and garlic. Quite mild  IMO.
Get the variety pack. Just do it. Love the flavor, texture, and chewiness.
I would give this 5 sars if it were just a little creamier but it wouldn't stop me from buying again.
traces.review_title: Really good compared to the bad stuff.

traces.review_text: I guess I am not a fan of any "alternative" sweetener so keep that in mind. This is a real objection. The slightly off-taste of the sweetener is too profound for me. Otherwise...these are brilliant and look and feel like they should. I had to throw the whole order away because of my dislike of the sweetener.
Buy them. They are the best.
As always they knocked it put of the park with these. Chocolate covered anything is a winner!
Soft, not sticky with chunks of salt mixed in... Good choice!
traces.review_title: Carmel, how could you go wrong?

traces.review_text: I needed the cord and pieces for the Bluetooth headset we ordered.  Both of these pieces, arrived on time and as I ordered.  However, the licorice is hard as a rock and tasteless!  My husband is a big fan of soft licorice.  The WILEY WALLABY is not what he wanted.  The bag says soft and the product is anything but soft. calling the customer line did help.

The product arrived a day late.  As well as being soft they are delicious!!  My Mom and us kids got candy like this from my Grandma and she gave it to you on a spoon.  Every kid, grandkid, cousin or not.  We all got a spoonful of this gooey, delicious, golden candy for our own.  Only thing was we had to bring the spoon back empty!  If you didn't bring the spoon back you didn't get anymore and you had to go look for the spoon.
I have loved the red raspberry flavor since I was a kid.  Hard to find, so when I saw these in bulk had to get them.
Great coffee at a great price. Shipping was fast as well.
traces.review_title: great coffee at a great price.

traces.review_text: I have to admit, I had very low expectations of this product due to less than stellar experiences with other instant coffees. I figured that if it's drinkable it will be okay. It's actually very good! It doesn't taste like a fresh cup of french press, but it's pretty tasty and is significantly better than some drip coffees - mellow, not bitter. I bought this to take to work as I don't have access to a coffee pot. The container is huge, but I'll be buying more when I run out.
I got these to give to my boyfriend for Valentine's day and he loves them!

This stuff is great. You need to rehydrate before using. I've soaked it in milk and added it to cereral. Soaked it in broth and added it to pasta & red sauce. Soaked it in spicy teryaki and added it to rice noodles. It's very versatile and easy to use. Plus it's cheap and shelf stable (before soaking).

Lancaster caramels used to be everywhere in my town of Vero Beach, but now they are no where to be found. I even called the Hersey Company to find the closest place to purchase them. They directed me to 2 stores but when I went to them they no longer had them. Can you tell I love them😋They are the best caramels I ever tasted and I've tried them all.
Although delicious, this is a high price for 2 8 ounce bags.rip off price
Always liked using this when microwaving veggies..it infuses with the steam.
Delicious!! My favorite cheese. Wish it shipped with dry ice or more ice.
It was good but not best licorice I have ever had.
traces.review_title: Only raspberry licorice I can find

traces.review_text: The best I have tried on Amazon. The 2nd best I have had.
traces.review_title: A little too soft for my taste.

traces.review_text: Yuk! Waste of money purchase
yummy
tastes great
A great little box that led me to getting a new morning drink. Drinks were fine even after being delivered in 90 degree weather.
These were absolutely delicious! My wife and I finished them in a few days. I would highly recommend these for yourself or a gift!
Ever since I discovered salted caramel ice cream, I was in love.  Now I have a second love in Tara's sea salt caramels--wow!!!
It is best I have ever had!
Soft, chewy, delicious
Great for our tool party! Adorable! Only wish they had a tape measure one too since our boy is obsessed:)
Great buttery flavor, will purchase again.
To salty
Did not realize that the bottles were so small. Not worth the money.
Delicious!!
Taste great. Super crunchy.
Extremely difficult to get paper off of caramels. I tried putting some in the refrigerator to see if that would help, but it did not. I would not purchase again.
My daughter says they are a must have in her daily snack tray. She loves the softness and great flavor. I have sent these to her as a gift numerous times and get a big smile each and every time!
So tasty! The packaging would have to be a little nicer for me to gift it, but the caramels themselves are delicious. I filled up my candy dish and had to order more!
i bought these for my mom, she loves homemade carmels and i thought this would be good for her and she absolutly loves them. great gift!
Loved them
traces.review_title: They judt melt in your mouth.

traces.review_text: The picture makes it look like there are a lot of chocolates but there are only a few and they weren’t very fresh.
I’m buying more because they are so darn good!  They also have a mocha caramel that is delicious.
Absolutely delicious!  Soft, great taste, great packaging!
I usually purchase Tara’s Salted Caramels but they were out so I purchased these.  I will not purchase as substitute in future. They were just okay.
Just buy… you won’t regret!
Very pleased with purchase. I almost expected them to be a bit hard/stale. They were not! Very soft/fresh.
The label says that it contains bio engineered food ingredients.
My absolute favorite caramels!
The taste was fine,not any different than what I buy in the grocery store and considering each piece of fruit breaks down to about $4 it wasn’t worth it.
Reasonable price and great quality!
Waited awhile for these not shipping fault there was a major ice storm in TX BUT I do not see a place to contact seller as two of the ginger ones ( the ones I really wanted ) exploded in my box 😢
These were awesome. Thank you
Very strong but delivered on time and fast and alot of product for the price thank you.

I love nu salt! I had to get this for my mother in law and husband. The are both watching their sodium and have slight heart conditions. I have heard and read great and bad things about this . I think hey no salt or sugar it's great! I even talked to a man who's wife has a pacemaker and this is all she uses. I think in a way doctors tell you or anyone really that EVERYTHING is bad for you in someway or another. We are sticking with it. I am getting some for my father whom recently had a stroke thank the lord he is ok God Bless thanks Amazon
traces.review_title: Nu salt NO SODIUM NO SUGAR GREAT STUFF

traces.review_text: Core water just wasn't was what I expected. I have tried many bottled water and didn't really care for the taste. The core water does have good value. I also didn't care for the huge bottle and lids

I absolutely loved the 365 everyday value pistachios! I bought these for husband for low sodium diet because unsalted. He actually loved as well. The pistachios were fresh easy to open and you can really taste the flavor. I will continue to purchase highly recommend great value.

Amazon's happy belly chunky chocolate chip cookies are amazing. I believe they might be better than some of other competition! The price you can not beat and goes great with milk fresh and crunchy. Great job KUDOS! HIGHLY RECOMMEND
traces.review_title: Delicious my new favorite can't beat the price either

traces.review_text: My husband and I can't get enough of these TARA'S caramels. They are delicious the salt just gives it that kick of YUM AND TEXTURE ! There is not one thing I have to say negative about. I highly recommend if a caramel lover.
traces.review_title: TARA'S AMAZING CARAMELS SO SO GOOD!

traces.review_text: Zenergy gum was great especially if you don't feel like drinking a hot cup of coffee. I love the fact it is sugar free and no aspartame. The gum Zenergy also has vitamin bs in it to add to caffeine. The only thing that could improve is taste its ok could be better but not bad. I all would most definitely recommend easily stick in pocket or purse and when you are feeling a little drowsy chew a piece! Recommended!!
traces.review_title: Gum with a burst of energy

traces.review_text: The chili & lime peanuts are a little to spicy for me. I love spicy foods body doesn't anymore. They also have a bit of a citrus kick to them as well. I would recommend if you like spicy
traces.review_title: Planters are good if you like spicy

traces.review_text: I wasn't into Macncheese anymore but I thought why not. I said wow these are great especially the size. The texture is awesome and very cheesy. I like to add a little bit of sour cream and salsa to mine THATS just me. I highly recommend these no down side fast easy lunches or snacks great.

The Hormel chicken Alfredo actually surprised me . I thought "this really isn't to bad. The noodles aren't too soggy which I do not like tastes like Alfredo add your pepper of course. I recommend cheap fast little meal.
traces.review_title: Good stuff for a minute meal

traces.review_text: Kraft sure does know there Mac& cheese! I thought I was fix and in love with another brand of preportioned Mac. Until I tried the Kraft. I have had the box before and like but these are delicious kudos. I very much and highly recommend these for all ages. So so scrumptious!

This is AMZING. I do not understand the reviews that state that the salt is overpowering, it is not. The flavors and in perfect harmony. I ate them solo and also melted them down to make kettle corn Carmel popcorn. Wonderful.
The best ever had
Got to have them.
Very good, subtle notes of vanilla, sea salt and butter. Not cloyingly sweet but just right for a sweet tooth fix.
Came melted and thrown into a bag that wasn't insulated.

After dealing with kids all day, I love adding this tea into my relaxation routine. It blooms absolutely gorgeously.  The box it comes in is nice as well, despite the fact mine came broken. The key to a fast bloom is to put the bloom in first and then pour hot water over it.
Delicious and healthy. Only downside is the sodium content.
Just okay. Not the best. The pasta was to thick and the filing had a wet texture. I also found a large piece of steam sticking straight outta one ravioli. Glad I was observant.
traces.review_title: Large stick/steam sticking out of pasta

traces.review_text: Could drink this without gagging. It takes like a cupful of wet Earth.

Incredibly convenient shelf stable milk. I don't drink milk every day so this stops me from having to commit to buying a gallon or pint. Also convenient because I'm transitioning my twins to whole milk and J don't have to warm cold milk in the dead of night or morning. I took away one star because its ultra pasteurized. Tastes great though.
Perfect size lollipops for little hands.  Brought because my child has very early cavities that the dentist is trying to treat to agressively.
traces.review_title: Great for early cavities in small kids.

traces.review_text: I love biryani but the few times I've tried to make it myself have not turned out well. This was an excellent alternative and surprisingly good for being frozen. Wish it had more chicken.  It seemed like more rice than anything.
Disgusting and arrived full of water. Minced in tiny pieces.
traces.review_title: Disgusting and not worth the expense

traces.review_text: I brought this as a nice gift for myself and definitely didn't disappoint. I liked everything with the exception of the marinated artichokes. Yuk! Good portions as well and the basket is cute as well as reusable.
Wow, these really work. The taste is okay but I'm definitely feeling relaxed right now. I do not recommend drinking these during the day or operating a vehicle after consuming.

These are so tasty! Nice crunch but not tooth shattering like corn nuts. They could have more BBQ flavor but they still taste great and the bag is huge. Hits the spot and is cheaper than a box of love corn.
Yuk! I had to throw this away. The vinegar taste was overwhelming.

Such a disappointment. I was not expecting a high volume at 4.4 oz., but the way it was cut (9 pieces) didn’t even fill the square in the packaging to hold it. It is thick but the pieces are all different sizes and there is very little flavor, there are a good amount of nuts
But the pieces are large. The packaging is done beautifully. The box is as you see it, it is coated and substantial. Inside there is a a plain square covering a small inset box, covered with a piece of tissue, that holds the Turkish Delight. Unfortunately that is where the
It ended I lifted the tissue and nine pieces of different sizes and heights were just plopped in. I wish as much attention was paid to the Delight as was to the packaging.
traces.review_title: Beautiful packaging, very little flavor, not worth the calories.

traces.review_text: Wonderful the best!
What can I say, I adore blow pops and my local drug store was always out of them.  Now I have my very own stash and they're so delicious!

I saw how these taffys were made on a TV show and I just had to try them.  These are the BEST taffys I have ever had in my life!  You must try them.  I'm hooked.  The taffy is so delicious and the peanut butter in the middle is superb.
traces.review_title: These are the BEST taffys I have ever had in my life

traces.review_text: I have never heard of these candies until I saw a show recently on TV about how they're made and knew I had to try them!  They are heavenly!  I'm hooked, already ordered my 2nd bag of them.  They're perfectly sweet and the peanut butter in the center is the perfect touch!
traces.review_title: They're perfectly sweet and the peanut butter in the center is the ...

traces.review_text: Love these!  I can't find them in the store anymore.
traces.review_title: Love these! I can't find them in the store ...

traces.review_text: OMG came across this at 7-11 and thought I'd try it.  I'm hooked!  These croissants are so fresh and the vanilla cream is so delicious!  Love them so much!

Why can't I find these in the stores anymore?  These noodles are so yummy and easy to prepare.  I love the little veggie pack that comes with it.  So happy to find them on Amazon.  I love to eat them for linch at work.
These m&Ms came crushed as though someone stomped on them.

I tried this out with chicken tenders and it was delicious!  You make a slight slurry with the batter and water (instructions on the box) to wet your chicken, and then you dip it into the dry mixture and it's ready for frying.  I will definitely buy this again!  The flavor is really good, hot and even cold!

SO GOOD!  I was in heaven eating this cheese danish.  The cheese is the best I've ever tasted in a cheese danish before and it's a nice thick layer of it.  THE BEST!!  The dough is buttery and rich.  I will buy these again and again!

My mouth waters just thinking about Zingers!  The chocolate cake is so moist, the icing superb, and the cream filling puts it over the top!  When you need a piece of chocolate cake, have a Zinger.  Bet you can't have just one though!  They're that good.

My husband loves this salmon.  I'm not a good cook so when I can get fish that is already seasoned, I like to go for it.  I'm so happy I found something really good my husband likes.  He said it's juicy, flavorful, and delicious.  I cook it in the air fryer.

These were my salads during the week since I've been working from home during the pandemic!  I LOVE them.  It's like lunch?  No problem!  Just go to the fridge and grab my salad!  The salad is always fresh, the chicken is always delicious.  I love these.  Lately, they've been sold out.  I think other people are loving them also!  I hope they make more, more, more!

These cupcakes are the best!  The frosting is heaven on earth.  The cake is nice and not dry at all but for me it's all about the frosting and this is it!  I'm always on the hunt for the perfect frosting and I found it!  One review said there was too much frosting but I'm a frosting girl so they were absolute perfection.

I'm a chocoholic and only for Hersheys Milk Chocolate.  Since Whole Foods didn't carry it, and I was craving chocolate, I thought I'd try Tony's Chocolonely since I saw such great ratings.  I just bit into this chocolate bar expecting it to not measure up to Hersheys and I'm blown away, this chocolate is BETTER than Hersheys!  It's the BEST milk chocolate I've ever eaten.  How can I ever go back to mediocre when I've discovered this candy bar!  I'm truly amazed.  Ate half the bar in one sitting and had to really make myself wrap up the rest for later!

Wow, this was an impressive piece of cake!  I expected it to be dry and boring like the cake slices from my local grocery store.  However, I was wowed at the first bite!  The cake is moist, sweet and delicious.  I'm a frosting person and usually judge a cake by the amount of frosting on it, but this layer of frosting was the perfect amount.  The cake was so good that the frosting became secondary.  I can't wait to buy this again and again.  I hope I can find it in vanilla too!

The picture of the bananas makes them look so good.  Why do I keep buying these?  Never again.  They keep arriving looking and feeling like they've been kicked around in a soccer game!  They're always bruised and abused.  I must remember not to order these again no matter how good the picture looks!
Mmmm, Mmmmm is all I can say when I'm eating these awesome salted caramels!  They're so good I bought more containers to give out at Christmas.  They're so good!

These cupcakes are so good!  The frosting on the top is heavenly, thick and sweet - just the way frosting should be!  I loved that there was more frosting inside the cupcake also.  The cake was sweet, moist, and really delicious.  I cannot wait to eat another one!
I did not have high hopes for this cheese danish but I was blown away!  It is so good!  It's soft and moist and the cheese topping is delicious.  I will buy this again and again!

The Parla manicotti was amazing!  It smelled so good heating in the oven so I knew I was in for a good meal and I was right.  The sauce and cheese filled shells were nothing short of heaven!  I could eat this every day!

I would give this delicious cake 5 stars if only the cake part was moist.  The cake is very good, the frosting is amazing, but the cake is a little on the, I don't want to say dry, but it's light and crumbly.  Still good, and I would definitely not discourage anyone from buying it.  I just prefer cake to be moist to the point where you could squeeze it in a ball and it would maintain its shape.  Do purchase, it's yum!

So disappointing!  I love Raisinets and these are just inedible.  The chocolate covered raisins are kind of greyish and sickly looking.  I tasted them and they're not fresh tasting either.  They don't expire until next year (May 2023) so I'm not sure what sort of damage happened to them but definitely NOT worth the money.  I'm tossing them in the trash.  They just don't look or taste right.
traces.review_title: I never should have bought these online!

traces.review_text: These buns wowed me!  They're so big and perfect for burgers.  They are sturdy and delicious.

These double dipped peanuts live up to their name.  They are coated generously in a delicious milk chocolate and I find it so hard to stop eating them.  They are so yummy and worth every penny.  You won't regret buying these.

This is now my favorite of the Hamburger Helper varieties!  It is so good!  It should be called spicy BBQ because it seemed to have a little kick to it, and it wasn't too sweet.  It's super delicious and I can't wait to make it again.  Sorry, Hamburger Helper Lasagna, you're now #2 in my line up.  I highly recommend this Sweet BBQ Hamburger Helper, so yummy!
This hamburger was so flavorful and juicy!  The package said it had brisket and short rib meat in it also, whaaaat?  So Good!  I will buy it again and again.
Amazing. And I’m a caramel girl.
Taste was very good
Best coffee I've had!
Bought these for my 94 year old Nana’s birthday and she loved them. Said they are delicious!
traces.review_title: I want to try them next!

traces.review_text: Amazing !  You will be happy!  WE sure are!
traces.review_title: Don't worry,  be happy  order today!

traces.review_text: Perfect!!!!
So amazing l!!!! Love them!!
Very nice taste, well balanced.
Love this cereal, glad I tried it because now it's my new favorite.  Beautiful but not over powering vanilla taste, not too sweet, just right.
Jelly Belly is always spot on with their flavors and this is no exception.  Very enjoyable.

I purchased for my spouse and also for my doctor office.  Everyone that tasted one said it was the best they ever had in terms of taste, creamy, soft and just plain yummy.  I couldn't get over the raves!  It's a winner and I'll keep this in mind for home and gift giving going forward.  Great product.

After reading reviews I purchased this snack.  It had very little variation in taste so, for us, it was rather boring.  We are used to a mix with varying textures and flavors ranging from sweet to slightly spicy but this had none of that with the exception of the nuts coated in thick sweet crunch - the only item that was a hit with us. Maybe it's what a family gets used to, glad we tried it but won't be buying again.

I bought these suckers because they advertise good flavor and sugar free.  I thought the cost was a bit much but hey if they help not to get in trouble with the dentist and taste good then it'd be worth it.  But they all taste the same, sweet yes but no flavor. Other people apparently rated the taste differently, I don't understand why but I didn't have the same experience.
I grew up on these as a kid and was so happy I could purchase them for my kids to try! They loved them as well.
Super happy these came early. Only downfall is 6 cookies in a bag, but worth it.
These are great, flavor is great. Definitely will buy again

Impressed with the flavor and texture. They
are amazing and I will definitely be purchasing again. Will make a great gift as well. Super happy
Came as advertized. . . p[probably will be buying more in near future
Liked very much / we us it to add over food
this was a gift, but my friend says it was delicious . . . .
glad I found this: brought back good childhood memories. . . . . / ordering more soon. . .
traces.review_title: Boston Baked Beans Medium Box- 24 / Box

traces.review_text: good price; good flavor; good purchase for me: had to hide the amount from friends: they loved the flavor too. . .

traces.review_text: I wasn't a big fan of the taste, but my lady friend really loved them: good price:

traces.review_text: really good candy: liked the small packages they came in, makes it convenient to carry

traces.review_text: really liked both of these candies: liked the zip lock bags they come in: help preserves freshness. . .

traces.review_text: fresh, came as described;zip lock bag did not work: I just transferred peanuts to Tupperware. .
traces.review_title: LaetaFood French Burnt Peanuts Classic Old School Candy (3 Pounds Bag)

traces.review_text: These caramels have a wonderful and smooth butter flavor. Packaged nicely and individually wrapped. At first bite they reminded me of mass produced caramels as they were not as soft as some I like. But I do love the buttery flavor once they began to melt in my mouth.
They are soft, creamy and delicious.
These are the best tasting caramels!

These are pretty good. Super soft, melt in your mouth goodness. Do it. Read some reviews talking about this was too hot, or it’s not enough for how much you pay — cut it, this is some of the best candy I’ve ever had. Everyone’s had their bad days and you’d be crazy not to buy like three of these.

Edit 3/12: I came back a couple months later because I was thinking about them, they’re that good. If you ordered them and left a bad review, shame on you and your family lol. Just stick em in the fridge like 10 min before you wanna eat them if they’re kinda melty. Coming back with a picture and update when I finally make turtles with them.
Large walnuts in a resealable bag that taste very fresh. Perfect
Best peanut butter on the market. Yummy roasted taste. You will need to stir the natural oils in once you open the jar. The  peanut butter is thin so keep it in the refrigerator if you want it thick.
I love this maple syrup & am a repeat buyer. It's everything you'd expect a maple syrup to be.

You know you get a great tasting olive oil if you can dip your bread right into it. I would like to be able to purchase a larger bottle because we go through it quickly. A bit spendy, but worth buying for those special dishes.
traces.review_title: You know you get a great tasting olive oil if you can dip your bread ...

traces.review_text: Product had white chalky covering & did not taste fresh at all. I’ve had these before when purchased from a store and they were much better.
traces.review_title: I’ve had these before when purchased from a store and they were much better.

traces.review_text: Fresh taste. I will buy again. Greae for almond milk, roasted snacks & homemade almond butter.
It’s hard to go back to boring popcorn!
Love the midnight blue best but both a good.

I love this product but it arrived completely shattered because it was mailed in an envelope with minimum protection. Who in their right mind mails a glass jar through the post office in an envelope? I didn’t take a chance on a second order. Good grief!
Tasted old. I will try another company.
I will order again. They are very hearty, with good flavor. It’s kinda like eating whole wheat bread vs white bread. Do not expect it to taste like white grits.

This was my second purchase. The first bottle was wonderful, however, this bottle was rancid.
I reached out to the company, but they never responded.
I prefer the buttery taste of this product over other corn syrups.
I love these caramels. Soft, chewy and buttery. They do not have that funny wang other caramels may have.  I have to hide them from my husband so they are not gone in a day or two!

I am originally from the South and White Lily is my go-to for biscuits.  However, my biscuits would not rise with this bag. I have tried several baked items with the same results. This is not typical of White Lily.  Maybe it was the way it was stored? Or for how long?  I do not know.
I was expecting a more apple butter texture so I was disappointed in this product. It is  more jelly like and the taste is nothing special.
I love the mix of fruit in this spread. I am almost out and will be ordering again.
I have tried other brands but I always come back to this one for the flavor and smoothness.
Great office snack gift!
Heard about these on a Podcast. They taste amazing. Love them and love that the company gives back.
These are sooo good! They don’t stick to your teeth

Strawberry lemon is so good! I have not tried any other flavors yet. But this is really good I’ve drank one every day for two weeks and definitely seeing a difference in my digestion. It also gives me more energy
Convenient and delicious!
Mouth watering delicious!
Sold as a case of 12 packages. Fabulous deal got it for under $6.00. One month until expiration, froze 9 for later! Would definitely order again!
Cutes little boxes! The candy was rock hard, wouldn’t even dissolve in the mouth. Absolutely embarrassing as I sent out four orders to each of my adult granddaughters! Complete waste of my money.
traces.review_title: My four orders were rock hard
